more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Is Zimbabwe Ready for the Next Wave of Industrial Automation?
more.description: For decades, automation in manufacturing evolved slowly. Machines became more efficient, production lines slightly faster, and software gradually improved the management of factory operations. But the industrial landscape is now entering a new phase where technology is advancing at a pace that could fundamentally reshape how factories operate. more.title: Surviving water shortages: easy meal prep ideas for crisis cooking
more.description: HARARE – As recurring water shortages continue to affect urban and peri-urban communities across Zimbabwe, many households are adopting practical strategies to prepare meals while using as little water as possible. more.description: Six-time Grammy winner Dionne Warwick has announced her final studio album titled “DWuets”.
